name: Bean Curd with Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Soak tree ears in warm water until soft. Drain and chop coarsely.
3. Heat oil in a wok and, when very hot, add ginger, garlic, and scallions. Stir quickly.
4. Add tofu, stirring constantly.
5. Add chopped tree ears, chilies, and peas. Stir.
6. Add sugar and vinegar, tossing everything together.
7. Spoon the mixture into a serving dish and sprinkle with sesame oil.
8. Serve over rice.
